  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 1100 addresses the increased number of public meeting disruptions local governments face statewide.",
    "The bill establishes mechanisms to de-escalate disruptions during public meetings.",
    "Senate Bill 1100 is intended to enhance public access to meetings and strengthen the democratic process.",
    "The legislation was created to protect public officials and meeting attendees from targeting, bullying, and harassment.",
    "Disruptive behaviors such as hate speech and intimidation at public meetings drive people away from civic engagement.",
